title: User Initials — add getUserInitials() and formatFullName() utilities for profile avatar fallback
commit_message: feat: add getUserInitials and formatFullName helpers to utilities.js for profile avatar text fallback
changed_symbols: getUserInitials (new export — returns up to 2 uppercase initials, e.g. 'John Doe' → 'JD')
formatFullName (new export — trims and capitalises first+last name into one display string)

what_the_diff_does.before: If a profile avatar image fails to load, the UI shows nothing. First and last name are used as raw strings wherever they appear, with no unified capitalisation.
what_the_diff_does.after: getUserInitials(firstName, lastName) returns the first uppercase letter of each name joined together (max 2 chars; falls back to '--' when both are empty). formatFullName(firstName, lastName) trims both parts, joins them with a space, and runs them through capitalizeFirstLetter. Both are pure functions with no external dependencies.
what_the_diff_does.visible_change: Profile avatar shows a two-letter monogram (e.g. 'JD') when the image cannot load. Display names on the profile screen and header are consistently capitalised regardless of how the server returns the name casing.
what_the_diff_does.compile_note: Both functions are pure additions to utilities.js — no existing function is modified. The file's other exports are completely untouched.

CRITICAL.reason: user-initials.pure.test.js declares src/helpers/utilities.js as its source and contains describe('getUserInitials') with 7 tests and describe('formatFullName') with 7 tests — all 14 are CRITICAL.
tests: getUserInitials > returns two uppercase initials from first and last name: ('John', 'Doe') => 'JD'
getUserInitials > returns only the first initial when lastName is empty: ('Alice', '') => 'A'
getUserInitials > returns only the second initial when firstName is empty: ('', 'Smith') => 'S'
getUserInitials > returns '--' when both firstName and lastName are empty strings
getUserInitials > returns '--' when both are null or undefined
getUserInitials > trims leading and trailing whitespace before taking the initial
getUserInitials > uppercases the initial regardless of the input case
formatFullName > combines first and last name with a space and capitalises each word
formatFullName > returns only the first name when lastName is empty
formatFullName > returns only the last name when firstName is empty
formatFullName > returns an empty string when both are empty or whitespace-only
formatFullName > trims extra whitespace from both parts before combining
formatFullName > handles null and undefined gracefully by treating them as empty
formatFullName > does not add a trailing space when lastName is missing

HIGH.reason: utilities.pure.test.js declares src/helpers/utilities.js as its sole source. utilities.js is the changed file, so all 61 existing utility tests must be re-run to confirm no regression.

SKIP.reason: All remaining test files do not declare src/helpers/utilities.js as a source.

coverage_gaps.gap: Covered by 7 tests in describe('getUserInitials') in user-initials.pure.test.js.
Covered by 7 tests in describe('formatFullName') in user-initials.pure.test.js.

jest_run_note: user-initials.pure.test.js runs 14 CRITICAL tests. utilities.pure.test.js runs 61 HIGH tests confirming no regressions in existing utility functions. All 2 gaps closed.
